screenshots.screenshotInterpretation: Dark navy background. A yellow circle (sun) is visible near the upper-centre of the scene. Below and to the left of centre, there is a blue square (ship). Near the ship there are two green arrow shapes and one small green dot. The arrows appear to be pointing in different directions (one left, one up-right).

Dark navy background. The yellow circle (sun) remains in the same position near upper-centre. The blue square (ship) has moved slightly to the left compared to frame 0. The two green arrow shapes and one small green dot have moved with the ship, maintaining their relative positions. Arrows point left and upward.

Dark navy background. The yellow circle (sun) remains stationary at the same upper-centre position. The blue square (ship) has moved further to the left and slightly down compared to frame 1. The two green arrows and small green dot continue to travel with the ship in the same relative arrangement. Arrows point left and up-right.

Dark navy background. The yellow circle (sun) is stationary in the same position. The blue square (ship) has continued moving further left and slightly down, now noticeably further from its starting position. The two green arrows and small green dot remain grouped near the ship, moving with it. Arrow directions have shifted slightly as the group rotates around the sun.

Dark navy background. The yellow circle (sun) remains stationary at upper-centre. The blue square (ship) has moved further left and down, now in the lower-left area of the scene. The two green arrows and small green dot are still clustered around the ship, continuing to move with it. The arrows appear to be pointing in directions consistent with their rotation around the sun.

videoInterpretation: The sequence of 5 frames over 800ms shows a top-down space scene on a dark navy background. A yellow circle (sun) remains completely stationary near the upper-centre throughout all frames. A blue square (ship) moves progressively leftward and downward across the frames, consistent with orbital motion around the sun. Two green arrow shapes and one small green dot move together with the blue square, maintaining their positions relative to it as it orbits. All objects are clearly visible against the dark background in every frame.

answers.question: Is there a yellow sphere visible in the scene?
answers.answer: Yes. A yellow circle (rendered as a sphere in top-down view) is clearly visible near the upper-centre of the scene in all 5 frames.

answers.question: Is the yellow sphere stationary (same position across frames)?
answers.answer: Yes. The yellow circle remains in exactly the same position in all 5 frames. It does not move at all.

answers.question: Is there a blue box visible in the scene?
answers.answer: Yes. A blue square (box) is clearly visible in all 5 frames.

answers.question: Does the blue box change position between frames (orbiting)?
answers.answer: Yes. The blue box moves progressively leftward and downward across frames 0 through 4, indicating orbital motion around the stationary yellow sphere.

answers.question: Are there green arrow-shaped objects visible in the scene?
answers.answer: Yes. Two green arrow shapes are visible in all 5 frames, along with what appears to be a small green dot. The arrows are clearly distinguishable as arrow shapes.

answers.question: Do the green objects move with the blue box as it orbits?
answers.answer: Yes. The green arrows and green dot remain clustered around the blue box in all frames, moving with it and maintaining their relative positions as it orbits the sun.

answers.question: Are all objects visible against the background in every frame?
answers.answer: Yes. The yellow sphere, blue box, and green arrows are all clearly visible against the dark navy background in every one of the 5 frames.
